summary: Iteration 20: Complete testing of AI Agents feature (News Editor Agent + Investigative Reporter Agent). All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Editor section shows editorial, hero stories, duplicates. Investigator section shows 3 topics with Run/View Report buttons. Report view displays investigation report with event timeline. Agents run as subprocesses (non-blocking) using Gemini Flash LLM.

passed_tests: GET /api/agents/editor/latest returns editor report with editorial_en, editorial_te, hero_picks, duplicate_groups
Server responsive after starting editor agent
GET /api/agents/investigator/report/telangana-politics returns report with report_en, report_te, events
GET /api/agents/investigator/timeline/telangana-politics returns events list with title, summary, source
Bilingual content verified (EN + TE) in editor reports
Bilingual content verified (EN + TE) in investigation reports

news_editor_agent.editor_latest_api: Returns editorial_en, editorial_te, hero_picks, duplicate_groups, hero_articles
news_editor_agent.editor_run_api: POST starts subprocess, returns immediately with status:started

investigative_reporter_agent.topics_api: Returns 3 topics with id, name_en, name_te, keywords, event_count
investigative_reporter_agent.report_api: Returns report_en, report_te, events array, topic info
investigative_reporter_agent.timeline_api: Returns events with title, summary, source, published_at, image

frontend_ui.topic_cards_display: 3 topics with Run Investigation and View Report buttons
frontend_ui.event_timeline_displays: 25+ events with images, titles, summaries, sources

critical_code_review_comments: agents.py correctly uses subprocess.Popen for non-blocking agent execution
run_agents.py is standalone script with proper asyncio.run() entry point
All MongoDB queries exclude _id field with {"_id": 0} projection
LLM calls have 25-30 second timeout to prevent blocking
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements

test_credentials.note: No login required for agents dashboard

seed_data_creation: Agents have already been run - editor_reports, investigation_events, investigation_reports collections populated
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Agents feature VERIFIED. News Editor Agent analyzes articles, detects duplicates, generates bilingual editorials. Investigative Reporter tracks 3 topics (Telangana Politics, India Politics, Corruption) with event timelines and bilingual reports. Agents run as subprocesses to avoid blocking server. Test file: test_agents_api.py

mocked_apis_list: Admin OTP verification uses hardcoded OTP 123456 for phone 9876543210
